figures.caption: Figure 1: Exemplary architecture of one of our proposed networks incorporating label distribution heatmaps: The 2-Decoder network, with separate decoders for label segmentation and heatmap predictions, thus forcing the encoder to extract features supporting both predictions.
Table 1: Main quantitative results. MM-WHS values report Dice, Jaccard, HD, and ASSD; WHS++ reports Dice only, as summarized in the thesis. Best values per block are in bold.
